steps.title: Compare associated traits
steps.content: The table shows strong differences for incubation duration and capacity for multiple broods, while the number of parental incubators appears in both display and non-display groups.

steps.title: Reject overread conclusions
steps.content: Choice A says all three traits are equally associated, which the table does not show. Choice C reverses the pattern by emphasizing less opportunity and longer incubation. Choice D narrows the claim to species with more than one incubator. The remaining choice matches the stronger associations. The answer is B.
